site.heroDesc: Hi, I'm Augustine, the creative mind behind Demarsive Media. I help businesses stand out through modern design, branding, and digital experiences.
site.heroTagline: We Build Brands That People Remember.
site.aboutText1: I'm Augustine Ackah, an IT professional and digital creative based in Accra, Ghana. With over 4 years of experience, I combine technical skills with creative design to deliver high-quality digital solutions.
site.aboutText2: As the founder of Demarsive Media, my goal is to build a strong personal brand while helping businesses improve their online presence through design, technology, and digital marketing.

portfolio.title: Telus Inc — Luxury Cars
portfolio.description: Complete brand identity for a luxury automotive company including logo, typography, and brand guidelines.
